prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-7PC-1LB-PAYDIRT-ADVANCE-BLK-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 7pc Advanced Level 1lb Paydirt Gold Panning Kit, Prospecting Equipment Tools, Black Description: If you're looking to challenge your gold panning skills and techniques, look no further than the ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo Advanced Paydirt Gold Panning Kits.

With the included advanced level paydirt from ASR Outdoor brand ambassador Bobby Bo, a trip to the claim site won't be needed. From the comfort of your home, put your gold panning skills to the test with just the few pieces of gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit.

The 1lb bag of advanced paydirt is unclassified and includes a considerable amount of heavier or more coarse materials like gravels and black sands. Classification work and use of the 8lb magnetic separator tool included with this gold panning kit will be required, in order to work your paydirt deposit down to a finer concentrate, that will in turn make it easier to pan for and extract gold. This paydirt features only fine gold for a more difficult extraction process. Good luck.

When panning, you'll be using ASR Outdoors 10 inch finishing gold pan; this gold pan features two riffle traps to catch gold, a wide textured bottom for efficiency during separation and a saturated solid black color to highlight gold. This lightweight but super tough pan is molded from one piece of ABS plastic, is buoyant in water and will hold up to many seasons of prospecting to come.

In addition to the 1lbs advanced paydirt and 10 inch finishing gold pan, this ASR Outdoor gold panning kit includes x1 3oz snifter bottle, x1 glass storage vial, x1 pipette and x1 8lb magnetic separator tool. A great gold panning kit for the more experienced gold prospector looking to challenge and keep their gold panning skills and techniques sharp. Search Terms: gold rush panning pan kit paydirt pay dirt mining tools sluice box equipment rock hounding adult hobby him outdoor activities kids camping gear travel sports and outdoors rush fathers day gifts Features: - PAYDIRT GOLD PANNING KIT: Enhance your gold panning skills at home with these 1LB unclassified advanced level paydirt and 7 piece essential gold prospecting equipment tools before going out in the field - ADVANCED LEVEL GOLD PAYDIRT: 1LB bag of paydirt is engineered by prospector Bobby Bo; made up of unclassified paydirt and loaded with black sand and coarse material; gold paydirt only contains fine gold for a more difficult panning and extraction process - FINISHING GOLD PAN: Featuring two sidewall riffles to trap gold, a wide textured bottom for efficient separation and a saturated solid black color to highlight gold in the bottom of the pan; lightweight, super tough gold pan that will hold up to years of prospecting - BLACK SAND MAGNET: A must have gold mining tool; this will allow you to quickly and effectively pull out black sand and other magnetic iron materials from your gold rich paydirt, making it easier to spot gold in your working concentrate - GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: This ASR Outdoor gold panning kit includes 1lbs paydirt bag, 10 inch traditional gold pan, 3oz snifter bottle, glass vial, carabiner, pipette and 8lbs magnetic separator tool === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7pc 1lb Advanced Black Gold Panning Kit
